_comment: Structured mirror of _history-2mo.md — the COMPRESSED long-term Live Context behind the minute-level hot data. Not raw events; this is the archived trajectory. Models how an ambient system scales: recent=precise (jsonl), older=summarized (this). Voice: neutral system summary. Dani-specific content fictional; anchored to real milestones in _research-dossier.md.

window.label: Join (~Series A) → day before hot window

atAGlance.joinContext: Joined around the $40M Series A (2026-03-24); Sergei named CEO; company repositioned to 'shared intelligence layer for the agentic age of work.'
atAGlance.arc: Arrived to make the personal product great; left Month 1 convinced the wedge is proactivity + coordination, not capture; spent Month 2 bending the Jun 9 launch around that conviction.
atAGlance.dominantThread: The Jun 9 public launch (D-12 in hot data).

realAnchors.event: Series A ($40M, Khosla); Sergei Sorokin named CEO; repositioning to shared intelligence layer
Blog: How to build agentic chat with Durable Objects
Blog: What Cheap Code Did to Design (day before hot window)

productThinkingEvolution.label: Make capture excellent
productThinkingEvolution.summary: Joined assuming the job was polishing the personal product — meeting notes, Screen Context, Magic Dot. Treated capture as the moat.

productThinkingEvolution.label: Capture is table stakes
productThinkingEvolution.summary: Competitor trials (Granola, Superhuman, esp. Littlebird's near-identical ambient pitch) collapsed that assumption. Language shifts from 'capture' to 'brief' and 'act'.

productThinkingEvolution.label: Proactivity + coordination is the wedge
productThinkingEvolution.summary: Framing converges with Sergei's thesis. Every launch decision filtered through 'briefs you, then moves work forward.' Resolved the company's positioning tension for herself before the team did collectively.

deFacto: External narrative / positioning (by default — no Founding PMM hired yet; carried with Samantha)
Product voice (recurring copy reviewer; enforces 'brief not capture')
notableDecisions: Reprioritized roadmap so launch-blocking Connections reliability outranks net-new features
Treats honesty about limitations as a launch asset (visible 'reconnect' states, known-limitations notes)
Chose to hire the launch-narrative owner (Founding PMM) before launch, accepting recruiting load mid-crunch

carriedForwardIntoHotWindow.becomes: Resolved Day 2 of hot data ('Highlight briefs you, then moves your work forward')

relationships.summary: Highest-trust, lowest-friction; recruited her. Treats his vision as the constitution; her Month-2 reframe operationalizes his thesis. Light-touch management.

relationships.tie: Head of Product Eng / peer; ex-Discord
relationships.summary: Primary cross-functional partner; product↔eng seam runs through them. Direct, occasionally in tension over scope (quality vs. more).
Tight launch-surface collaboration; design often blocked on her words.
Current messaging partner; mutually understood stopgap until founding marketer lands.
Recruiting logistics + launch ops; operational backbone.
Launch-critical work; trust built via fast defensible calls.

networkShape: Tight Discord-alumni core (Sergei, Parris, Dani) at center; thin senior launch layer (Sam, Samantha, Sarah); small eng bench. ~15-person company; Dani is one of few senior product voices. Every relationship load-bearing.

recurringPatterns.label: Decides with evidence, not vibes
recurringPatterns.detail: Defers binary calls until there's a number or a landed artifact.
recurringPatterns.hotEcho: 'let's see the patch land, then decide with real numbers'

recurringPatterns.label: Leads with the artifact, not the adjective
recurringPatterns.detail: Shows the concrete thing (brief, demo, proof point); distrusts abstract claims; resists overpromising verbs.
recurringPatterns.hotEcho: chose a one-liner with a verb she can back over 'runs your day'

recurringPatterns.label: Treats transparency as a feature
recurringPatterns.detail: Prefers visible failure states and honest limitations over hidden polish.

recurringPatterns.label: Protects focus windows, responds fast on blockers
recurringPatterns.detail: Batches deep work (positioning, PRD in Cursor) mid-morning / late-afternoon; clears blockers near-synchronously in Slack.

recurringPatterns.label: Moves on people fast when conviction is high
recurringPatterns.detail: Compresses hiring process when a candidate feels right.

recurringPatterns.label: Competitive trials are a personal ritual
recurringPatterns.detail: Installs and uses rivals herself; sharpest positioning comes from those sessions.

toolingFingerprint.linear: Watched through a launch-blocker lens, not a personal task list
toolingFingerprint.gmail: Low internal volume; candidate threads + external/press

briefUsage: Long-memory backdrop enabling claims the 2-day hot data can't: e.g. 'You've been converging on proactivity-over-capture for six weeks; today's one-liner is where it lands' or 'third time you've chosen a visible failure state over hidden polish.' Also answers the scale question: the system holds this compressed trajectory + a precise recent window, not thousands of live raw items.
